content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp
SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='J09A_temp'
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09A_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09A_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END)
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_POST_CODE1 INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY1 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_CITY2 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SALES_EMAIL TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN NET_POST_CODE1 INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN NET_CITY1 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN NET_CITY2 TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN NET_EMAIL TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN INSTALLATION TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET INSTALLATION = ANLAGE
UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09A_temp.INSTALLATION LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY1 = (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_CITY2 = (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SALES_EMAIL = (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), NET_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), NET_CITY1 = (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), NET_CITY2 = (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), NET_EMAIL = (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN TITLE ELSE (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN FORENAME ELSE (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SURNAME ELSE (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREET = CASE WHEN STREET IS NOT NULL THEN STREET ELSE (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN STREETNO ELSE (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END, CITY1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END, CITY2 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN TITLE ELSE (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN FORENAME ELSE (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SURNAME ELSE (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREET = CASE WHEN STREET IS NOT NULL THEN STREET ELSE (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN STREETNO ELSE (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END, POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END, CITY1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END, CITY2 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END
UPDATE J09A_temp SET NET_POST_CODE1 = NULL, NET_CITY1 = NULL, NET_CITY2 = NULL, NET_EMAIL = NULL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09A_temp SET SALES_TITLE = NULL, SALES_FORENAME = NULL, SALES_SURNAME = NULL, SALES_STREET = NULL, SALES_STREETNO = NULL, SALES_POST_CODE1 = NULL, SALES_CITY1 = NULL, SALES_CITY2 = NULL, SALES_EMAIL = NULL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09A mandatory reading entries for internal team processing.
Please find attached the J09A meter reading entries for EVU team processing.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp
